description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, angular profile and a predominantly dark brown to black coloration. The surface is coarse and uneven, featuring a mix of granular textures and some smoother, weathered patches. There are visible mineral veins and lighter inclusions running through the stone, adding visual complexity and a mottled appearance. Some areas display a rusty or ochre tint, likely from iron oxide staining, and faint markings or numbers are present on one face, suggesting it may have been cataloged or studied. The stone's edges are jagged, with some flat surfaces and sharp corners, indicating it may have been broken from a larger mass. Its overall appearance suggests it is dense and heavy, suitable as a natural obstacle or barrier in an urban landscape.
description: A dense, irregularly shaped stone with a coarse, mottled surface and dark brown to black coloration, featuring mineral veins and weathered patches.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest face of the stone, highlighting its granular texture, mottled brown and gray coloration, and visible mineral veins.
description_view_1: The stone appears darker and more angular from this side, with a prominent black surface and rough, jagged edges.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a mix of dark and lighter patches, with a clear view of the stone's thickness and some ochre staining near the top.
description_view_3: From above, the stone's irregular outline and flat upper surface are visible, along with catalog markings and a circular red symbol.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and veining with some mineral inclusions and faint catalog markings; no artificial carvings.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with some smoother patches and minor staining, indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved or manicured urban surfaces but may blend with natural landscaping or other stones nearby.
